text: The new icon design is a bit confusing but otherwise the app works great.
Delivery driver was super friendly. Food was perfect.
Nice variety of cuisines. Ordered Thai food and it was great.
Ordered for a family dinner, everyone was happy with their meals.
Good selection of restaurants. The app is easy to use.
Fast delivery and the food was still hot. Excellent service!
Food was good but the search results seem a bit off sometimes. Hard to find specific dishes.
Solid delivery experience. Will order again.
Best delivery app I've used. Always on time.
Great food delivery! Love how fast it arrived.
Love the app! The tracking feature is super helpful.
Really enjoying the new restaurant filters, makes browsing so much easier.
Payment process is really slow now. Waited over a minute for it to process.
Payment keeps failing on my iPhone. Had to try 3 times before it went through.
Ordered dinner, everything worked smoothly. Great burgers!
Can't complete any orders! Payment always times out. Very frustrating.
Fast delivery as always. Love the real-time tracking.
Payment failed twice but worked on the third try. Please fix this!
Apple Pay hasn't worked for me in days. Had to use my laptop to order.
Something is wrong with the payment. It just shows 'Something went wrong' every time.
Wrong order received. Got someone else's food. Support was helpful though.
Tried credit card and Apple Pay, neither works. What happened to this app?
No issues at all. Placed 3 orders this week, all perfect.
I've switched to UberEats because FoodDash payments never work anymore.
Sometimes works after 4-5 tries but usually just times out.

Updated the app hoping it would fix payments. Nope, still broken.

Switching to a competitor. Two weeks of broken payments is unacceptable.

Was a loyal customer for 2 years. Now I can't even place an order. Sad.
